title: phyllostegia fagerlindii
intro: Phyllostegia fagerlindii, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, is a flowering shrub native to Hawaii. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to promote digestive health, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia fagerlindii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, as well as topical creams and salves for external application.
